data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the fallback channel policy requirement.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the fallback channel policy when the preferred channel is blocked. However, the evidence does not provide concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The lack of specific evidence regarding how the system handles fallback channels when the preferred channel is blocked indicates a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of fallback channel policy when preferred channel is blocked.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the fallback channel policy.
